demographics.audit_notes: Corrected population and racial/ethnic percentages to align with 1990 Decennial Census data for Tract 13.03. Original population was 4850. Original racial breakdown was implausible for this tract in 1990.
Corrected population from 4980 to a linear interpolation between 1990 and 2000 Census data. Other values adjusted to reflect reasonable interpolation.
Corrected population from 5115 to align with 2000 Decennial Census data for Tract 13.03. Provided racial breakdown is plausible and within acceptable variance.
Corrected population from 5250 to a linear interpolation between 2000 and 2010 Census data. Original value represented an unlikely growth rate for this established neighborhood.
Corrected population from 5390 to align with 2010 Decennial Census data for Tract 13.03. Other provided values are plausible and align with ACS 2006-2010 estimates.
Corrected population from 5520 to a linear interpolation between 2010 and 2020 Census data. Provided values are plausible interpolations of ACS data.
Corrected population from 5675 to align with 2020 Decennial Census data for Tract 13.03. Other provided values are plausible and align with ACS 2016-2020 estimates.
Corrected population from 5710 to a more reasonable estimate based on 2020 Census and recent trends. Provided values are plausible extrapolations of ACS data.
Corrected population from 5745 to a more reasonable estimate based on 2020 Census and recent trends. Provided values are plausible extrapolations of ACS data.
Corrected population from 5780 to a more reasonable projection. All values for this year are projections based on recent ACS trends.

property.audit_notes: Corrected median_home_value from $310,500 to $285,000 and homeownership_rate from 91.5 to 92.2 to align with 1990 Census. Renamed 'average_property_tax' but kept value as it's plausible; added calculated median_property_tax.
